degrees.description: Studied the principles of mechanical systems design, thermodynamics, and applied physics. Gained hands-on experience with engineering drawings, manufacturing processes, and technical problem-solving.

Completed an intensive program focused on building dynamic web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and PHP. Learned best practices in version control, database management, and modern web architecture.

Specialized in software design and development with emphasis on coding standards, system architecture, and agile methodologies. Worked on real-world projects involving algorithms, APIs, and cloud-based solutions.
